revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-360

Gain function (G.B.)

Directive gain (U.S.A.)

For a given direction, 4PI times the ratio of the radiation intensity in that direction to the total power radiated by the antenna.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
